title: Spanish-Style Tortilla Española
description: A traditional Spanish omelette made with charred onions and potatoes, perfect for breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the charred onions and potatoes, and sauté for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, beat the eggs and season with salt and black pepper.
Add the cooked onion and potato mixture to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a small amount of olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the tortilla towards the center.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are almost set.
Slide the tortilla out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
